span.p: PAIN: Checking twice\n(purchase list AND Blue Tally)

div.style: color: rgb(153, 27, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: PAIN: Manual one-by-one entry\ntakes a long time

div.style: color: rgb(153, 27, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(153, 27, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: PAIN: Multi-part items\n(camera kits) lose pieces

div.style: color: rgb(153, 27, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: PAIN: Items left on desks\nverification gaps

div.style: color: rgb(153, 27, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: PAIN: Sticker-roll IDs collide\npre-filled ID often wrong

div.style: color: rgb(76, 29, 149) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TOUCHPOINT 1
Who: Student team rep
What: hands equipment over
Device: phone (walking between buildings)

div.style: color: rgb(76, 29, 149) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TOUCHPOINT 2
Who: Maason / Kevin
What: types asset metadata into Blue Tally
Device: desktop at desk during return week
